xl xr : Type u

j : (mk α✝ β✝ a✝¹ a✝).RightMoves
left✝ :
  ∀ (i : LeftMoves 0),
    ¬(fun a' b' =>
          (fun y a =>
              Acc.rec
                (fun x₁ h ih =>
                  (fun x IH' =>
                      match x, IH' with
                      | (x₁, x₂), IH' =>
                        (fun x y le =>
                            (∀ (i : x.LeftMoves), ¬le y (x.moveLeft i) ⋯) ∧
                              ∀ (j : y.RightMoves), ¬le (y.moveRight j) x ⋯)
                          x₁ x₂ fun a' b' => IH' (a', b'))
                    x₁ ih)
                ⋯)
            (a', b'))
        (mk α✝ β✝ a✝¹ a✝) (moveLeft 0 i) ⋯
right✝ :
  ∀ (j : (mk α✝ β✝ a✝¹ a✝).RightMoves),
    ¬(fun a' b' =>
          (fun y a =>
              Acc.rec
                (fun x₁ h ih =>
                  (fun x IH' =>
                      match x, IH' with
                      | (x₁, x₂), IH' =>
                        (fun x y le =>
                            (∀ (i : x.LeftMoves), ¬le y (x.moveLeft i) ⋯) ∧
                              ∀ (j : y.RightMoves), ¬le (y.moveRight j) x ⋯)
                          x₁ x₂ fun a' b' => IH' (a', b'))
                    x₁ ih)
                ⋯)
            (a', b'))
        ((mk α✝ β✝ a✝¹ a✝).moveRight j) 0 ⋯
